mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate reduces discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals acute economic distress and falling corporate earnings, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or t-statistic < 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate robust consumer demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample regression, or joint signal yields negative returns.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth above its long-term trend signals supply-side strength and capacity utilization, leading to positive short-term S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal flips direction during inflationary periods, producing negative returns when INDPRO exceeds trend.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth correlates with stronger corporate earnings and cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Correlation coefficient between GDPC1 growth and 60d returns falls below 0.1 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and higher discount rates, depressing S&P 500 valuations over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Market prices in inflation positively, yielding > 55% positive returns when CPIAUCSL accelerates beyond threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Rising total nonfarm payrolls combined with a falling unemployment rate indicates a healthy labor market expansion, supporting positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power out-of-sample, with Rank IC < 0.02 across all tested periods.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales signal weakening consumer spending and reduced corporate revenue, leading to negative short-term S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days during recessions.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns when Fed provides liquidity support, resulting in > 50% positive outcomes.
